title: Application — full set at the official source
summary: UI's complete application filing — cover letter, Volume 1 project description, Appendices A–F (agency correspondence, ecological assessment, visual assessment and photo-simulations, cultural resources, EMF, formal requests), and Volume 2 mapping and drawings. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs to pull every document into this archive.

title: Bulk-Filed Exhibits — full set at the official source
summary: Bridgeport and Fairfield zoning codes, zoning maps, plans of conservation and development, and wetlands materials filed in bulk. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Municipal Consultation Filing — full set at the official source
summary: UI's pre-application municipal consultation package — cover letter, project description, appendices, outreach log, FAQs, meeting presentations, postcards, and the UI project page. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Procedural Correspondence — full set at the official source
summary: Completeness reviews, interrogatories, acknowledgements, party and intervenor decisions, continuance requests, schedule decisions, and the record-close memo. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: State Agency Comments — full set at the official source
summary: Comments from the Connecticut Airport Authority, Council on Environmental Quality, Department of Transportation, and State Historic Preservation Office. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Public Official Comments — full set at the official source
summary: Letters from state representatives, state senators, the federal delegation, and the Fairfield state delegation. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Hearing Information — full set at the official source
summary: Hearing notices, hearing programs, public access instructions, and site plans. Zoom hearing recordings stay external links at the official source — they are never downloaded into this archive. Run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs to mirror the documents.

title: Schedules — full set at the official source
summary: Proceeding schedules as revised through the docket. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Service Lists — full set at the official source
summary: Who gets served with every filing — the parties, intervenors, and their representatives. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Transcripts — full set at the official source
summary: Evidentiary hearing transcripts, the public comment session transcript, the final evidentiary hearing transcript, and transcript memoranda. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Applicant Exhibits (United Illuminating) — full set at the official source
summary: UI's public notice submission, interrogatory responses, pre-filed testimony, witness resumes, late-filed exhibits, and briefs. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Party / Intervenor Exhibits — full set at the official source
summary: Filings from BJ's Wholesale Club, the SCNET group, grouped LLC intervenors, Fairfield Station Lofts, the Town of Fairfield, Superior Plating Company, the City of Bridgeport, and preservation/neighborhood groups. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Motions and Objections — full set at the official source
summary: Motions filed through the proceeding and the objections they drew. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Briefs / Findings of Fact — full set at the official source
summary: Post-hearing briefs and proposed findings of fact from the parties. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Council Draft Findings — full set at the official source
summary: The Council's draft findings of fact circulated before decision. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Final Decision — full set at the official source
summary: The Council's findings of fact, opinion, and decision and order. Not yet mirrored locally: run tools/sync-docket-516.mjs.

title: Court-Ordered Remand — Docket 516R
summary: After appeal, the court sent the case back to the Council — the remand proceeding runs as Docket 516R with its own record. Find it from the Siting Council's pending matters index; the 516R record is the continuation of this fight.
